zh.Holme Pierrepont, Rushcliffe, Nottingham: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Annora Pierrepont於1536年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特時，她的父親Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont26歲，母親Elizabeth Babington24歲。她於大約1550年與John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1598年4月22日在她的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annora Pierrepont于1536年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特时，她的父亲Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont26岁，母亲Elizabeth Babington24岁。她于大约1550年与John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1598年4月22日在她的家乡享年62岁。

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Annora Pierrepont was born in 1536, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth Babington, was 24. She married John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar about 1550, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died on 22 April 1598, in her hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annora Pierrepont est née en 1536, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Babington, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar environ 1550, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée le 22 avril 1598, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

Lei sposato John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar circa 1550, nel Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Annora Pierrepontが1536年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで生まれた時，父Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepontは26歳，母Elizabeth Babingtonは24歳であった。約1550年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントでJohn Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1598年4月22日に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Annora Pierrepont(이)가 1536년 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Babington(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 4월 22일 그녀의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar aproximadamente 1550, em Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annora Pierrepont родилась в 1536 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir George Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepont было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Babington, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Rossell, of Ratcliffe on Soar около 1550 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла 22 апреля 1598 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.
